name: ASTRAL - Dream Or Reality
short_description: Survive the ultimate horror in ASTRAL - Dream Or Reality, the game that challenges your psyche and decisions.
detailed_description:
Experience the ultimate survival horror adventure with ASTRAL - Dream Or Reality! Step into the shoes of Adam and immerse yourself in a world full of puzzles and dangers.



Survive in a world teeming with obstacles and perils by not only managing your stamina but also keeping an eye on your psyche.
Find useful items to stay alive or avoid excessive stress.
But beware: every decision you make influences the course of the story and can determine life or death.



Prepare yourself for a gripping narrative that will keep you captivated until the end.
As Adam, you will start with an ordinary evening that quickly turns into a true horror trip.
Will you uncover the truth and solve the mystery surrounding Kara and the enigmatic house, or will you venture down the wrong path, sealing your own fate?


And the best part is: ASTRAL - Dream Or Reality will receive free DLCs and content updates, continuously expanding and enhancing the game.
Do you dare to embark on this adventure?
